creator: vladimir.chukharev@gmail.com
text:
Created attachment 189311
Patch

Robot Framework web testing library Selenium2Library has been renamed to SeleniumLibrary. A new Selenium2Library has been created as a compatibility layer for the transition period.

A new devel/py-robotframework-seleniumlibrary port is submitted as Bug 224814.

This devel/py-robotframework-selenium2library port is to be updated to the compatibility layer after the new port is commited.
